Monitor FIFO Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x180
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Monitor bus FIFO status indicators

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:4] RSVD r 0x0 -
[3] MON_FIFO_UNFL r - -
[2] MON_FIFO_OVFL r - -
[1] MON_FIFO_EMPTY r - -
[0] MON_FIFO_FULL r - -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

MON_FIFO_UNFL

Monitor FIFO underflow - 1=underflow detected, 0=normal

MON_FIFO_OVFL

Monitor FIFO overflow - 1=overflow detected, 0=normal

MON_FIFO_EMPTY

Monitor FIFO empty - 1=FIFO empty, 0=data available

MON_FIFO_FULL

Monitor FIFO full - 1=FIFO full, 0=space available
